surfaces.card: bg-white rounded-[18px] border border-gray-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1
surfaces.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-sm rounded-[18px]

components.button_primary: bg-[#0F4C81] text-white rounded-[18px] px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-[#0A365D] hover:shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-[#F7F9FC] text-[#0F4C81] border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-[18px] px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-white hover:border-[#2A7DE1] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.badge: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-[#EBF4FF] px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium text-[#2A7DE1]
components.input: w-full rounded-[18px] border border-gray-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 text-sm focus:border-[#2A7DE1] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2A7DE1]/20 transition-all

motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}

sections_spec.name: Hero
sections_spec.layout: Grid 2-columns (Text left, Image right) or Full width bento. Use glassmorphism floating badges on the image.
sections_spec.features: Headline: 'Sauberkeit auf höchstem Niveau.', 2 CTAs, floating trust elements.

sections_spec.name: Services
sections_spec.layout: Bento Grid or 3-column auto-fit. 15 Cards total.
sections_spec.features: Cards with icons, hover interactions, rounded 18px. Minimal text.

sections_spec.name: Why Choose Us
sections_spec.features: Checkmark icons, concise text, highly readable.

sections_spec.name: Process
sections_spec.features: Connecting lines, step numbers in accent circles.

sections_spec.name: Industries
sections_spec.layout: Carousel or Masonry grid of 10 image-backed cards.
sections_spec.features: Dark overlay on hover, text reveals.

sections_spec.name: Gallery
sections_spec.layout: Masonry grid. Hover zoom. Lightbox functionality.
sections_spec.features: Before/after implied or simply high-end clean results.

sections_spec.name: Contact
sections_spec.layout: 2-column: Form on left, Map/Info on right.
sections_spec.features: MongoDB submission structure, styled inputs with 18px radius.

hero.description: an office with a lot of desks and chairs

about.description: A person in yellow gloves and blue gloves cleaning a floor

services_industries.description: empty black rolling chairs at cubicles
Modern waiting room with chairs and inspirational sign
white couch and brown wooden table

gallery.description: white and brown living room set
A clean and organized home office desk with cleaning products
a hospital room with medical equipment in it
